title: A to Z Time Shock Game, Blue
features: CLASSIC GAME: Time Shock is an exciting shape-matching board game that challenges players to match shapes against the clock for fast-paced family entertainment
MULTIPLAYER FUN: Designed for multiple players aged 6 and above, making it perfect for family game nights and social gatherings
GAMEPLAY MECHANICS: Features a built-in timer and various geometric shapes that players must match correctly to corresponding slots on the game board
COMPONENTS: Includes a sturdy blue game board with timer, colourful shape pieces, and scoring pegs for tracking player progress
EDUCATIONAL VALUE: Helps develop pattern recognition, hand-eye coordination, and quick thinking skills while providing entertainment
description: Product Description Introducing the Time Shock Game, an exhilarating classic family board game that combines quick thinking with shape matching skills! This multi-player game from Star Games challenges players to match shapes against the clock, creating an atmosphere of excitement and friendly competition. The distinctive blue game board features a central timer dial and multiple shape-matching slots, complemented by vibrant orange game pieces. Perfect for ages 6 and above, this game helps develop pattern recognition, spatial awareness, and hand-eye coordination while delivering endless entertainment. The game board includes a recording system to track scores and a mechanical timer that adds pressure to each round. Its robust construction ensures durability for countless family game nights. Whether you're hosting a party or enjoying a quiet evening at home, Time Shock Game offers a timeless classic gaming experience that brings everyone together. The game's straightforward concept makes it easy to learn but challenging to master, ensuring hours of engaging gameplay for all skill levels. Directions Included (Manual) Safety Warning Not suitable for children under 36 months. Chocking hazard - small parts See more
